Uses of Class
org.moeaframework.analysis.collector.AttachPoint

Packages that use AttachPoint
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.analysis.collector
Collectors record information periodically during the execution of an algorithm.

  • Uses of AttachPoint in org.moeaframework.analysis.collector

    Methods in org.moeaframework.analysis.collector that return AttachPoint
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AttachPoint
    AttachPoint.and(AttachPoint that)
    Returns an attach point which performs the logical AND between two attach points, matching an object only if both attach points match the object.
    AttachPoint
    AdaptiveMultimethodVariationCollector.getAttachPoint()
     
    AttachPoint
    AdaptiveTimeContinuationCollector.getAttachPoint()
    Deprecated.
     
    AttachPoint
    AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtensionCollector.getAttachPoint()
     
    AttachPoint
    ApproximationSetCollector.getAttachPoint()
     
    AttachPoint
    Collector.getAttachPoint()
    Returns the attach point describing where this collector is attached.
    AttachPoint
    ElapsedTimeCollector.getAttachPoint()
     
    AttachPoint
    EpsilonProgressCollector.getAttachPoint()
     
    AttachPoint
    IndicatorCollector.getAttachPoint()
     
    AttachPoint
    PopulationCollector.getAttachPoint()
     
    AttachPoint
    PopulationSizeCollector.getAttachPoint()
     
    AttachPoint
    PSOCollector.getAttachPoint()
     
    static AttachPoint
    AttachPoint.isClass(Class<?> type)
    Returns an attach point that matches an object if its type is equal to the specified type.
    static AttachPoint
    AttachPoint.isDeclaredIn(Class<?> parentType)
    Returns an attach point that matches an object if it is a declared field of the specified type.
    static AttachPoint
    AttachPoint.isNestedIn(Class<?> ancestorType)
    Returns an attach point that matches an object if it is nested inside a class of the specified type.
    static AttachPoint
    AttachPoint.isSubclass(Class<?> type)
    Returns an attach point that matches an object if it is an instance of the specified type.
    static AttachPoint
    AttachPoint.not(AttachPoint that)
    Returns an attach point which performs the logical NOT on the given attach point, matching an object only if the attach point does not match the object.
    AttachPoint
    AttachPoint.or(AttachPoint that)
    Returns an attach point which performs the logical OR between two attach points, matching an object if either or both of the attach points match the object.
    Methods in org.moeaframework.analysis.collector with parameters of type AttachPoint
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AttachPoint
    AttachPoint.and(AttachPoint that)
    Returns an attach point which performs the logical AND between two attach points, matching an object only if both attach points match the object.
    static AttachPoint
    AttachPoint.not(AttachPoint that)
    Returns an attach point which performs the logical NOT on the given attach point, matching an object only if the attach point does not match the object.
    AttachPoint
    AttachPoint.or(AttachPoint that)
    Returns an attach point which performs the logical OR between two attach points, matching an object if either or both of the attach points match the object.
